message:
fix: self-heal now respects cached skip_user_config preference

run_setup_self_heal_for_server() hardcoded skip_user_config: false,
ignoring the operator's original --no-user-config choice. Now reads
the cached value from the existing self-heal cache, falling back to
false only when no prior cache exists.

Closes #71

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
